description: A weakness has been identified in Campcodes Advanced Online Voting Management System 1.0. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file /admin/voters_add.php. Executing manipulation of the argument photo can lead to unrestricted upload. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be exploited.
